headline: Ex-Google DeepMind and Databricks Engineers Launch Pomo to Apply AI Agent Principles to Decision-Dense Marketing Functions
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 08, 2026--Pomo, an agentic marketing intelligence platform built for mid-market, today announced $4.5 million in seed funding led by Kindred Ventures, with participation from Databricks Ventures, Seven Stars, SV Angel, Timeless Partners, and 645 Ventures. The round also includes backing from prominent angel investors including Scott Belsky, Mehdi Ghissassi, and Massimo Mascaro, all of whom have led AI and product organizations at Adobe, Google DeepMind, and Google AI. headline: Adobe (ADBE) is Thriving in the AI Landscape
summary: Harding Loevner, an asset management company, released its “Global Equity Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. For most of the past 15 years, US equities not only outperformed but created a perception of inevitability around their outperformance. This phenomenon, termed “US exceptionalism,” highlighted exceptional earnings growth, valuations, and a […]
